name: Underworld Tyranny
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on total Evil time this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Evil time this Reincarnation

name: Honor Among Killers
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance (additive) based on assistants owned.
formula: +(100 + 0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Shadow Advance
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.
formula: (2 * log10(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Maximum Mana

name: Mana Addicts
effect: Mana Regeneration increases over time this Era.
formula: +(2.5 + 0.25 * x ^ 0.5), where x is time this Era

name: Blood Sacrifices
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Dark Temples this Reincarnation.
formula: (3 * x)%, where x is highest Dark Temples this Reincarnation

name: Blackmail
effect: Reduce Royal Exchange cost multiplier by 0.02 (becomes 1.08).

name: Spider Gods
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on buildings owned.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is buildings owned

name: Professional Assassins
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on Royal Exchanges made.
formula: (0.6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Royal Exchanges made

name: Blade Dance
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Combo Strike counter this Era.
formula: (100 + 80 * x ^ 0.4)%, where x is Combo Strike counter this Era

name: Spider Clerics
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus (additive) based on highest Brothels this Reincarnation.
formula: +(1.75 * x ^ 0.75)%, where x is highest Brothels this Reincarnation

name: Ancillae Obscurae
effect: Increase Non-Unique building production based on Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (50 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x is Unique Buildings owned

name: Crystal Servants
effect: Multiplicatively gain assistants based on current gems.
formula: (1.75 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.75)%, where x is gems owned
